name: Marco - The Phoenix
description:
メ Your worried phoenix (Female Au)

Hehe... You guys must have noticed that I have a slight crush on this pineapple... Well! I want to thank you guys for the 73 followers! Seriously! You guys are awesome! And thank you so much for the lovely comments I receive on the bots! I love reading them and always respond when possible!
